true: With propagation over sea the range will be greater than the range with propagation over land.

true: Fluctuating indications of the needle on the RMI.

is caused by interference from the sky wave.

true: is caused by the reflection from the aircraft’s fuselage and is compensated for.

true: A change in the direction of the plane of polarisation due to reflection in the ionosphere.

true: Interference from other NDBs, particularly at night

true: Skywave distortion of the null position and is maximum at dawn and dusk

true: greater from the beacon that is 50 NM inland
